mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO hotel_room_stock ( room_type_id, hotel_id, sale_date, price, stock ) VALUES
( #{roomTypeId}, #{hotelId}, #{day}, #{price}, #{totalInventory} )

INSERT INTO hotel_room_stock ( room_type_id, hotel_id, sale_date, stock, price ) VALUES
( #{room.id}, #{room.hotelId}, #{time}, #{room.totalInventory}, #{room.defaultPrice} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE room_type_id = room_type_id
mapper.select:
SELECT h.id, h.name, h.city, h.district, h.business_area, h.base_price, h.main_pic FROM hotel h
h.status = 1
AND h.city = #{reserveRoomRequest.city}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hotel_room_type rt WHERE rt.hotel_id = h.id AND rt.status = 1 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hotel_room_stock rs WHERE rs.room_type_id = rt.id AND rs.sale_date BETWEEN #{reserveRoomRequest.startTime} AND #{endDay} AND rs.stock <= 0 ) )

SELECT id, hotel_id, room_name, bed_type, `window`, area, default_price, total_inventory, status FROM hotel_room_type rt
rt.hotel_id = #{getRoomRequest.hotelId}
AND rt.status = 1
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM hotel_room_stock rs WHERE rs.room_type_id = rt.id AND rs.sale_date BETWEEN #{getRoomRequest.startTime} AND #{localDay} AND rs.stock <= 0 )
